## Column headers from your export file

> ⚠️ **Please DO NOT share real transaction data.**  
> We only need the **column header names** from row 1 of your export file.  
> Open the `.xlsx` in Excel or Google Sheets, look at the very first row, and paste those cell values here.

```
e.g.: Fecha | Concepto | Importe | Saldo
```
